title: pcb-dfm Fab Capability Profile (ruleset)
description: A named fab capability profile that selects checks and overrides their thresholds/policy. Lives at pcb_dfm/check_data/rulesets/<id>.json and is applied by load_check_definitions_for_ruleset.

extends.description: Id of a base profile to inherit from (overrides/policy deep-merged, disabled lists unioned).

enabled_checks.description: Whitelist of check ids; null means all checks (minus disabled).

overrides.description: Map of check_id -> partial check JSON, deep-merged onto the base check definition (e.g. inject a top-level `limits` block).

policy.description: Global flags injected into every check's config (e.g. strict_plating_mode, fab_clips_silkscreen).
